readings.Aries: The shortcut exists. It will cost you something you didn't account for. Worth knowing now. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Taurus: The thing you've been protecting might not need protecting anymore. Consider letting it breathe. Act from the calmest part of yourself.
readings.Gemini: There is someone in your life who needs your full attention, not your cleverness. Give it to them. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Cancer: You are allowed to need things. You are not required to justify the need first. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Leo: There's a narrative about yourself you've been carrying that flatters you in the wrong direction. Let this one be easy.
readings.Virgo: Your instinct to fix the thing is right. The thing you're trying to fix may not be the source of the problem. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Libra: The person you've been accommodating has more capacity than you've been giving them credit for. Expect more. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Scorpio: The thing you've been orbiting without naming — name it today, even if only to yourself. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Sagittarius: The distance you put between yourself and difficult feelings is getting to be quite a distance. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Capricorn: Your standards for yourself are borrowed from somewhere. Examine the source. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Aquarius: Your tolerance for the unconventional is high. Your tolerance for being ordinary, in one small way, is lower than it should be. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Pisces: Something is converging — threads you've been holding separately are about to become the same thread. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
